title: Grind in an obscure field — niche-law / coding / crypto first-mover thesis
html:
TL;DR

  • Three-line late-August 2022 thesis: "Grind in an obscure field, then when opportunity comes you will be ahead. Happened with niche law practice, software programming, crypto."
  • Earliest articulated version of Yahir's obscure-field-first-mover career heuristic — pick a discipline before it's hot, hold position, harvest when it crosses into the mainstream.
  • Three-example pattern (niche law → software → crypto) is the proto-version of what becomes the AI search 2022 2026 thesis (ChatGPT launches 3 months after this note).
  • Pairs structurally with the obscure field grind concept and surface area of luck — same mental model, different framing.
  • Written ~2 months before 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream where the same instinct gets applied to ChatGPT seed-ideas.

Key quote

"Grind in an obscure field, then when opportunity comes you will be ahead. Happened with niche law practice, software programming, crypto."

Why it matters

This is the load-bearing career sentence of 2022 Yahir. The same heuristic powers:

  • The fall-2022 corvallis crypto club commitment (crypto = obscure → about to be mainstream)
  • The post-ChatGPT AI search thesis articulated days later
  • The 2024–25 AI Visibility Engine / ai search optimization work (SEO → AISO before consensus)
  • The 2026 rankett free-work-for-Caspian play (small-CRE before AI eats it)

It is the same bet, run four times — and by Aug 2022 Yahir already had the meta-frame for it.

Open questions

  • Where did the three-example list (law / software / crypto) come from? Specific essay or podcast?
  • The "niche law practice" example is unusual — possibly seeded by hinkin law / joshua hinkin (Grants Pass family-friend), worth checking timing.
  • Did Yahir ever name his current "obscure field"? (Closest answer: AISO / ai visibility engine in 2026.)

Wikilinks
